title: Alm's Recipe Addons
description: This Datapack adds recipes to Mariums Soulslike Weaponry, Vanilla, Eldritch End, Mythic Upgrades and End Remastered
body:
This Datapack adds Recipes for Prominence II, that the pack for sure needed. This addresses the issues of some bosses being finite in some worlds, meaning only a limited amount of players can fight them, Fallen Champion's Dragur Sword got a new recipe as to be able to be fought without a recursive recipe for it.   
  
This Datapack also makes Mythic upgrades Gems better renewable and the geodes actually have a use now. Necoium can be smelted in blocks aswell.
